CVE-2026-0257: Rapid7 Caught Attackers Abusing Forged VPN Cookies Against Multiple Customers
description: CVE-2026-0257 lets attackers forge Palo Alto GlobalProtect auth cookies and bypass VPN login. Exploitation confirmed since May 17. Palo Alto Networks addressed the vulnerability CVE-2026-0257 on May 13. Two weeks later, cybersecurity firm Rapid7 confirmed active exploitation across multiple customer environments. The flaw impacts the GlobalProtect portal and gateway components of Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS […]

   Description : A weakness has been identified in OFFIS DCMTK 3.7.0. title: CVE-2026-10192 - Tenda W12 httpd set_local_time_0 stack-based overflow
description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-10192
   
   Published :  May 31, 2026, 5:16 p.m. | 37 minutes ago
   
   Description : A vulnerability was identified in Tenda W12 3.0.0.7(4763). The affected element is the function set_local_time_0 of the file /bin/httpd. title: CVE-2026-10191 - Tenda W12 httpd cgiWifiMacFilterSet stack-based overflow
description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-10191
   
   Published :  May 31, 2026, 4:16 p.m. | 1 hour, 36 minutes ago
   
   Description : A vulnerability was determined in Tenda W12 3.0.0.7(4763). Impacted is the function cgiWifiMacFilterSet of the file /bin/httpd. This manipulation of the argument wifiMacFilterSet.macList.mac causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.
